lb-023i.title: Create defaults/ directory with default agent config
lb-023i.description: Create defaults/ directory with default agent config files for external mode: (1) defaults/CLAUDE.md — copy of root CLAUDE.md but self-modification section references .harness/Dockerfile instead of scripts/runner/Dockerfile, (2) defaults/AGENTS.md — copy of root AGENTS.md, (3) defaults/claude-settings.json — copy of .claude/settings.local.json. Also create project.conf.example with documented fields: REPO_URL, BRANCH, LOCAL_PATH.

lb-1n9x.title: Create scripts/init.sh — core init script
lb-1n9x.description: Create scripts/init.sh that copies harness files into an existing repo. Accepts target repo path as argument. Steps: (1) validate target is a git repo, (2) copy scripts/ directory, (3) copy AGENTS.md, (4) copy .env.example, (5) create SPEC.md from template if absent, (6) merge .gitignore entries (append harness entries not already present: logs/, .env, *.log, *.jsonl, !tests/*.jsonl, .claude/settings.local.json), (7) merge CLAUDE.md (append harness sections under <!-- ralph-harness-start/end --> markers, skip if markers already present for idempotency), (8) merge .claude/settings.local.json (union permissions.allow arrays, merge hooks objects), (9) print summary of actions taken.

lb-3ocz.title: Update .gitignore and end-to-end test
lb-3ocz.description: Update .gitignore to add: projects/*/.env, projects/*/logs/. Then end-to-end test: create projects/test-project/project.conf pointing at a test repo, create projects/test-project/SPEC.md with a simple task, run scripts/run.sh test-project, verify: correct repo cloned, overlays applied, agent works, no harness files committed to target, logs in projects/test-project/logs/. Also verify scripts/run.sh (no arg) still works identically for template mode.

lb-5tdk.title: Update container entrypoints for overlay injection
lb-5tdk.description: Update scripts/runner/run.sh and scripts/runner/run-epic.sh: after cloning the target repo and before lb init, check for /overlay/ directory mount. If present, copy files into workspace: /overlay/CLAUDE.md -> workspace/CLAUDE.md (if not already present), /overlay/AGENTS.md -> workspace/AGENTS.md (if not already present), /overlay/SPEC.md -> workspace/SPEC.md (if not already present), /overlay/claude-settings.json -> workspace/.claude/settings.local.json (mkdir -p .claude first, if not already present), /overlay/Dockerfile -> workspace/.harness/Dockerfile (always, for self-modification). If /overlay/ does not exist, behavior is identical to today (template mode).

lb-b2bb.title: Create scripts/lib.sh — shared project resolution
lb-b2bb.description: New file sourced by all host scripts. Contains: resolve_project() — accepts optional project name, if projects/<name>/project.conf exists sets RALPH_MODE=external and loads REPO_URL/BRANCH/LOCAL_PATH from it, otherwise sets RALPH_MODE=template with current behavior (git remote from own repo). resolve_overlay() — finds config file with priority: projects/<name>/ > defaults/ > repo root. build_overlay_dir() — assembles resolved overlay files into a temp dir for Docker mounting. Exports: RALPH_MODE, RALPH_REPO_URL, RALPH_BRANCH, RALPH_LOCAL_PATH, RALPH_LOG_DIR, RALPH_ENV_FILE, RALPH_VOLUME, RALPH_HARNESS_DIR, RALPH_PROJECT_DIR.

lb-b5ig.title: Structured JSONL logging with live stream formatter
lb-b5ig.description: Port physarum's stream-json + formatter pattern to ralph_harness. Switch from plain --verbose text to --output-format stream-json (JSONL), pipe through tee (durable storage) then TypeScript formatter (live colored terminal output). Test in ralph-test-13 before lifting to harness.

lb-chol.title: Update host scripts for JSONL pipeline
lb-chol.description: Update scripts/run.sh: add --raw flag support (skip formatter for scripting), change log extension to .jsonl, pipe docker output through 'tee $log_file | bun run stream-fmt.ts', update symlink to latest.jsonl. Update scripts/run-epic.sh: add logging pipeline (currently has none), add --raw flag, pipe through tee + formatter to logs/epic-EPIC-TIMESTAMP.jsonl, add latest.jsonl symlink.

lb-g4rj.title: Teach agent it can self-modify (Dockerfile, deps) across loop iterations
lb-g4rj.description: The agent reinstalls Rust every run because the container is ephemeral. It doesn't realize that changes committed to git (like modifying the Dockerfile to add Rust) persist across loop iterations. Add guidance to CLAUDE.md or the runner prompt so the agent knows it can modify its own infrastructure and benefit from it in subsequent runs.

lb-h0pc.title: Update scripts/run.sh for external mode
lb-h0pc.description: Source scripts/lib.sh. Accept optional project name as first non-flag argument. In external mode: use RALPH_REPO_URL/RALPH_BRANCH instead of git remote, run preflight checks against RALPH_LOCAL_PATH, use RALPH_LOG_DIR for logs, use RALPH_ENV_FILE for --env-file, use RALPH_VOLUME for Docker volume name, mount overlay directory into container (-v "$overlay_dir:/overlay:ro"), post-run: docker cp container:/workspace/.harness/Dockerfile to projects/<name>/Dockerfile if changed (before docker rm), pull into RALPH_LOCAL_PATH. Template mode (no project arg) must work identically to today.

lb-h3ux.title: Init script — adopt harness into existing repo
lb-h3ux.description: An init.sh script that copies harness files into an existing repo, handling conflicts with existing CLAUDE.md, .gitignore, and .claude/settings.local.json. Run as: scripts/init.sh /path/to/existing-repo. End state is identical to having used the GitHub template.

lb-iizd.title: Update remaining host scripts for external mode
lb-iizd.description: Update scripts/run-epic.sh, scripts/run-loop.sh, and scripts/decide.sh to support external mode: (1) run-epic.sh — source lib.sh, same project resolution and overlay mounting as run.sh, (2) run-loop.sh — pass project name through to run.sh and decide.sh, (3) decide.sh — accept optional project name, cd to RALPH_LOCAL_PATH so litebrite and SPEC.md access work correctly. All scripts must work identically in template mode (no project arg).

lb-j4ge.title: Create ralph-test-13 test bed
lb-j4ge.description: Initialize a new repo at /home/mdaum/devel/coobeeyon/ralph-test-13. Copy structure from ralph-test-12 (scripts/, CLAUDE.md, SPEC.md, .env.example, .gitignore, Cargo.toml, src/, etc). This is our sandbox for testing logging changes without affecting the harness. Push to GitHub as coobeeyon/ralph-test-13.

lb-kn83.title: Switch claude to stream-json output format
lb-kn83.description: Update scripts/runner/run.sh: add --output-format stream-json to claude invocation. Remove redundant inner tee and logdir/logfile setup (container is ephemeral, host tee persists logs). Update scripts/runner/run-epic.sh: add --output-format stream-json, change per-task log extension from .log to .jsonl (keep inner tee here since multiple tasks run in one container).

lb-lhgt.title: Update summary.sh and .gitignore for JSONL
lb-lhgt.description: Update scripts/summary.sh: change default from latest.log to latest.jsonl, change basename stripping from .log to .jsonl. Claude/haiku parses JSONL natively so prompt needs no change. Update .gitignore: add *.jsonl (currently only has *.log).

lb-ndrw.title: Test init script end-to-end
lb-ndrw.description: Test scripts/init.sh against repos with various states: (1) empty repo with no existing files, (2) repo with existing CLAUDE.md, .gitignore, and .claude/settings.local.json, (3) run init twice to verify idempotency — second run should not duplicate content. Verify that scripts/run.sh works from the initialized repo afterward.

lb-pwdo.title: External/stealth mode — run harness against repo from outside
lb-pwdo.description: The harness stays in its own repo and operates on target repos without adding any files to them. Adds a projects/ directory for per-project config. Run as: scripts/run.sh my-app. Target repo never gets harness files committed. Full backwards compatibility with template mode (no arg = current behavior).

lb-pz2p.title: Create scripts/stream-fmt.ts formatter
lb-pz2p.description: Port physarum's scripts/reflect-stream-fmt.ts to scripts/stream-fmt.ts. Nearly verbatim copy — it's already generic. Handles: system/init, assistant (tool_use for Bash/Read/Edit/Write/Grep/Glob/Agent, thinking, text), user (tool_result with code block collapsing), result (done summary with cost/turns). TTY-aware colors. Suppresses noisy tools (TodoRead/Write, TaskCreate/Get/Update/List, Read). Source: /home/mdaum/devel/coobeeyon/physarum/scripts/reflect-stream-fmt.ts

lb-rl57.title: Create test fixtures and verify formatter
lb-rl57.description: Create tests/sample.jsonl with representative stream-json events (init, assistant with tool calls + thinking, user with tool results, result with cost/turns). Verify: 1) cat tests/sample.jsonl | bun scripts/stream-fmt.ts shows formatted output 2) echo 'plain text' passes through unchanged 3) --raw mode works. This validates the pipeline without running claude-under-claude.
